short_summary: Iran deal, Lebanon strikes, Tren de Aragua
rationale: For US residents, the Iran deal remains the dominant story with direct policy and market implications; Israeli strikes on Lebanon add regional tension; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A signed Iran deal would affect US military posture, oil prices, and domestic politics — but Tehran's contradiction means no resolution yet, keeping uncertainty high for Americans.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Iran deal talks continue
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon amid ongoing US-Iran negotiations raise the risk of broader regional conflict that could draw in US forces or spike oil prices affecting American consumers.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates Tren de Aragua leader — continuation of established pattern of targeted strikes; limited new impact on daily American life beyond political messaging.
